summary: Complete frontend testing of HomePage.jsx (Emergent.sh replica Fase 2). All 15 requested features tested and verified working. The dashboard displays correctly for authenticated users at '/home' route with sidebar, agent mode selector, main input, quick suggestions, and all interactive elements working as expected.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing demo user
context_for_next_testing_agent: HomePage fully functional for authenticated users. Login redirects properly to /home. Submit with text navigates to workspace page. All data-testid attributes working correctly.

features_tested.homepage_loads_authenticated: PASS - HomePage loads correctly at '/home' route for authenticated users
features_tested.sidebar_recent_projects: PASS - 'Recent Projects' section visible in sidebar
features_tested.user_profile_sidebar: PASS - User profile (Demo User, demo@melus.ai) shown in sidebar footer with data-testid='user-menu-sidebar'
features_tested.header_melus_logo: PASS - Melus AI logo with 'e' icon visible in header
features_tested.agent_mode_selector: PASS - E1/E1.5/E2 mode buttons work correctly with data-testid='mode-e1/e1.5/e2'
features_tested.credits_display: PASS - Credits (1000) shown in header with data-testid='credits-btn'
features_tested.main_input_accepts_text: PASS - Main input (data-testid='main-input') accepts text correctly
features_tested.quick_suggestions_populate: PASS - data-testid='suggestion-0/1/2/3' buttons populate input with suggestion text
features_tested.submit_disabled_empty: PASS - Submit button (data-testid='submit-btn') disabled when input is empty
features_tested.submit_enabled_with_text: PASS - Submit button enabled when input has text (disabled=False)
features_tested.sidebar_toggle: PASS - data-testid='toggle-sidebar' works - sidebar width changes from 256px to 1px
features_tested.user_dropdown_menu: PASS - Clicking user-menu-sidebar opens dropdown with Credits, Settings, Sign Out options
features_tested.submit_navigates_workspace: PASS - Submit with text navigates to /workspace with workspace parameter

ui_elements_verified.sidebar: Left sidebar with New Chat button, Recent Projects section, User profile at bottom
ui_elements_verified.header: Toggle sidebar button, Melus AI logo with 'e', Agent mode selector (E1/E1.5/E2), Credits display
ui_elements_verified.main_content: Welcome message 'What do you want to build?', Main textarea input, Attachment and Voice buttons, Submit button
ui_elements_verified.quick_suggestions: 4 suggestion buttons: 'Build a todo app', 'Create an e-commerce site', 'Make a portfolio website', 'Build a chat application'
ui_elements_verified.footer: Text showing 'Powered by AI agents • E1 mode selected'

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are real - workspace creation, agent mode selection, credits display all work with real backend
